GeneralDescription.SourceString: Three fearless, ruthless, very good boys.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Three fearless, ruthless, very good boys.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The gods may have fled after the fall of Zeus, but the three-headed guardian of the Grim Gate has stayed behind at his master's request. What - or who - could Hades be having Cerberus wait for?
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The gods may have fled after the fall of Zeus, but the three-headed guardian of the Grim Gate has stayed behind at his master's request. What - or who - could Hades be having Cerberus wait for?
